response: {"subfigures":[{"label":"a","description":"Pie charts showing experimental success results for 209 eCLIP experiments in K562 (top) and HepG2 (bottom) cell lines, with colors indicating the amount of amplification (eCT) required to obtain 100 fmoles of library. 102 experiments pass validation metrics and are deposited at the ENCODE project portal.","plot_type":"pie","plot_category":"categorical","x_axis":null,"y_axis":null,"color_variable":"eCT (amplification level)","error_bars":"none","sample_size":"209","shows_individual_points":false,"data_source":null,"assays":["eCLIP"],"supplementary_tables":["Supplementary Table 2"],"statistical_test":null,"facet_variable":"cell line (K562, HepG2)"},{"label":"b","description":"Scatter plot where each point represents a successful eCLIP experiment, with x-axis showing the eCT of the best (replicate 1) replicate and y-axis showing the increase in eCT between replicate 1 and replicate 2 (indicating decreased efficiency in the second replicate). Seven IgG-only eCLIP experiments are indicated by black lines across 75 kDa intervals from 25 to 250 kDa.","plot_type":"scatter","plot_category":"relational","x_axis":{"label":"eCT of replicate 1 (best replicate)","scale":"linear","units":null,"data_type":"continuous","is_inverted":false},"y_axis":{"label":"Increase in eCT between replicate 1 and replicate 2","scale":"linear","units":null,"data_type":"continuous","is_inverted":false},"color_variable":"IgG-only vs. standard experiment","error_bars":"none","sample_size":null,"shows_individual_points":true,"data_source":null,"assays":["eCLIP"],"supplementary_tables":[],"statistical_test":null,"facet_variable":null},{"label":"c","description":"Distribution plot showing the fraction of usable (non-PCR duplicated) reads out of all uniquely mapped reads for eCLIP, public iCLIP experiments (ENCODE consortium and published datasets), and 152 published CLIP datasets (PAR-CLIP, HITS-CLIP), displayed as individual points overlaid on kernel density smoothed histograms.","plot_type":"kde","plot_category":"distribution","x_axis":{"label":"Fraction of usable (non-PCR duplicated) reads out of all uniquely mapped reads","scale":"linear","units":null,"data_type":"continuous","is_inverted":false},"y_axis":{"label":"Density","scale":"linear","units":null,"data_type":"continuous","is_inverted":false},"color_variable":"CLIP method (eCLIP, iCLIP, CLIP/PAR-CLIP/HITS-CLIP)","error_bars":"none","sample_size":"eCLIP: 209 experiments; iCLIP: 127 (12 ENCODE + 115 published); CLIP: 152 published","shows_individual_points":true,"data_source":null,"assays":["eCLIP","iCLIP","PAR-CLIP","HITS-CLIP"],"supplementary_tables":[],"statistical_test":null,"facet_variable":null}]}
